title: Peach O'Reno
writer: Tim Whelan, Ralph Spence, Eddie Welch
actors: Bert Wheeler, Robert Woolsey, Dorothy Lee
plot: After a quarrel at their 25th wedding anniversary, Joe and Aggie Bruno decide to divorce each other, and both leave for Reno. So do their daughters Prudence and Pansy, but they want to get their parents back together. Joe and Aggi...
